changes.v2: Collect their name, number, and the property address. Tell them a Guardian representative will contact them next business day. Don't say morning specifically because sometimes we're in the field early.
During hours, ask for the property address first — we cover the greater Atlanta metro area only. If it's outside our service area, politely let them know and suggest they contact a local provider.
